attacking_style: Launches long-range solo attacks from the base of summit finishes rather than waiting for steep gradients, capable of sustaining effort over entire climb to the line.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes where early positioning at climb base allows solo efforts; benefits from longer climbs that reward sustained power over explosive acceleration.
vulnerability: Unknown - limited observations. May struggle in races requiring repeated attacks or tactical positioning in larger groups given preference for early solo moves.
key_patterns: Attacks from bottom of climbs rather than waiting for steeper sections or finale.
Peaks form for late-season races, suggesting periodization focused on autumn objectives.
Capable of converting solo breakaways into stage victories and race lead positions.
form_trajectory: positive: Victory at Tour of Guangxi indicated peak form timed for late October after difficult season, suggesting strong finish to 2018 campaign.
